commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.profiler_smoke: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-iter420-c2-profiler/raw -o c2-current -- python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 2 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-iter420-c2-profiler/c2-profiler-bench.json

conclusion: Current c2 profiler evidence shows projection kernels dominate the filtered trace (~45.3%), followed by fused norm/rotary/other (~34.8%), attention (~13.5%), MoE (~6.3%), and sampling (<0.1%). Correctness remains green and scaling references are complete, but native c2 remains below both c1 and serial-bridge thresholds; do not update retained performance rollups.

profiler.notes: Current-commit c2 512/128 rocprof smoke. Filtered trace removes ROCclr transfer/fill noise and single-row argmax validation rows; no retained performance claim is made.

decision.reason: compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_serial_bridge must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim; profiler command --batch-sample-mode must match retained sampler mode; profiler command must include --batch-sample-eq-ok; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-artifact must match retained sampler equality artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-rows must match retained sampler equality rows; profiler command must start with rocprofv3; profiler command device env prefix must match retained command; profiler command --profiler-json must match profiler.artifact_path; profiler command --json must match retained artifact path; profiler command --c1-baseline-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --serial-bridge-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --primitive-correctness-json must match retained reference artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-mode must match retained sampler mode; profiler command must include --batch-sample-eq-ok; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-artifact must match retained sampler equality artifact; profiler command --batch-sample-eq-rows must match retained sampler equality rows
